title: IntelHub
abstract: A desktop tooling for technology watch and innovation tracking, enabling companies of any size to gain clarity on what initiatives are being pursued across the organisation.

title: Claude Code Evaluation
abstract: A closed evaluation of Claude Code via AWS Bedrock involving ~50 engineers to assess its value compared to other GenAI coding solutions.

title: Kiro Evaluation
abstract: Evaluation of Kiro (IDE and CLI) with focus on spec-driven development, assessing its value for developers, product analysts, and testers compared to other GenAI coding solutions.

title: Spec-Driven Development Methods
abstract: An overview of emerging spec-driven development (SDD) frameworks and tools — BMAD Method, OpenSpec, GitHub Spec Kit — that structure AI-assisted development around specifications rather than ad-hoc prompts.

title: AWS Strands SDK — Agentic Systems
abstract: Evaluation of the AWS Strands Agents SDK as the foundation for building use-case-driven agentic systems targeting bulk operations, non-coder workflows, and multi-repository automation.

title: GitHub Copilot
abstract: AI-powered coding assistant deployed as the first GenAI solution delivered to developers across the organization.

title: Emerging AI Coding Tools: New Contenders and Paradigms
VS Code Custom Agents (.agent.md)
abstract: VS Code custom agents (declared via .agent.md files) allow teams to package domain-specific knowledge, tool restrictions, and workflow instructions into reusable agent personas that live alongside the code.

title: OpenAI Codex — CLI Coding Agent
abstract: OpenAI Codex is a cloud-based AI coding agent that runs autonomously in a sandboxed environment, executing multi-step coding tasks (bug fixes, refactors, feature implementation) from natural language instructions via the ChatGPT interface.

title: Devin — Autonomous AI Software Engineer (Cognition)
abstract: Devin by Cognition is a fully autonomous AI software engineer that can plan, code, debug, and deploy entire features end-to-end from task descriptions, operating as a virtual team member with its own development environment.

title: Augment Code — Context-Aware AI Coding Assistant
abstract: Augment Code is an AI-powered coding assistant that differentiates through deep codebase understanding — indexing entire repositories to provide context-aware completions, refactoring, and code generation that respects project-wide patterns and conventions.

title: Mistral Vibe — AI Coding Agent (Mistral AI)
abstract: Mistral Vibe is a coding agent from Mistral AI that combines a conversational interface with code generation and execution capabilities, emphasizing a natural, flow-state coding experience powered by Mistral's open-weight language models.

title: AI-DLC Enterprise Evaluation — Measuring AI-Driven Development Efficiency
abstract: Evaluating AWS's AI-DLC (AI-Driven Development Life Cycle) methodology for enterprise adoption — assessing whether replacing traditional SDLC rituals (sprints, epics) with AI-centric constructs (bolts, units of work, Mob Elaboration, Mob Construction) delivers measurable development efficiency gains in our context.

title: Business Analysts in VS Code — AI-Assisted Specification Writing
abstract: An initiative exploring how Business Analysts can use VS Code with AI-assisted tooling to create, manage, and validate specifications — bringing structured requirement documentation closer to the development workflow and enabling spec-driven development practices.

title: Rust Microservice Rewrite — Reducing Cloud Costs via Language Migration
abstract: An evaluation of rewriting performance-critical microservices from Java/Python to Rust, targeting 60-80% reduction in cloud compute costs through Rust's zero-cost abstractions, minimal memory footprint, and elimination of garbage collection overhead.
